title: TACZ Recruits
description: This mod allows for recruits from the recruits mod to use TACZ guns and animations.
body:
TACZ Recruits bridges Minecraft mods Recruits and Timeless and Classics Zero, allowing Recruits NPCs to fully wield TACZ firearms with proper combat behavior, handling, and animations. Watch your squads equip rifles, pistols, shotguns, and more while using authentic TACZ reloads, aiming, firing, and weapon animations directly in combat.

Transform your soldiers into fully armed modern infantry with seamless compatibility between the Recruits system and TACZ’s advanced gun mechanics. Whether you are building military scenarios, defending bases, or creating large-scale battles, TACZ Recruits brings your NPC armies to life with immersive firearm support and cinematic action.
